name: No-Molasses Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine baking soda and syrup; set aside.
2. Beat butter with an electric mixer until creamy. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in syrup mixture.
3. Combine flour and the next four ingredients (cinnamon, ginger, cloves, salt); add to butter mixture alternately with water, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for at least 10 minutes before serving.
